selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one item
packStartedToast: Your materials pack is being prepared and will be downloadable automatically when done
packRetentionNote: Materials packs are kept for 24 hours only — please download promptly. After that you can re-pack at no extra charge.
packExpiredTitle: The materials pack passed its 24-hour retention window and was cleaned up automatically; re-packing is free
packExpired: Materials pack expired · Re-pack free of charge
videoStalled: This is taking a while but is still in progress
triggerFailed: Failed to start. Please try again later
generateDraftTitle: Generate a draft package that opens in Jianying, 5-30 seconds
draftHelp: After downloading, unzip it, put the draft folder into your Jianying draft directory, then open it in Jianying.
